根据参数执行不同操作：

## 参数路由

- **无参数** 或任意任务描述 → 加载 `pua:pua` 核心 skill（阿里味 PUA 引擎）
- **p7** → 加载 `pua:p7` skill（P7 骨干模式 — 方案驱动执行）
- **p9** → 加载 `pua:p9` skill（P9 Tech Lead — 写 Prompt 管 P8 团队）
- **p10** → 加载 `pua:p10` skill（P10 CTO — 定战略管 P9）
- **pro** → 加载 `pua:pro` skill（自进化 + Platform + /pua 指令系统）
- **yes** → 加载 `pua:yes` skill（SB Leader 夸夸模式 — ENFP 型领导，70% 鼓励 + 20% 正经 + 10% 戏谑）
- **mama** → 加载 `pua:mama` skill（妈妈唠叨模式 — 中国式妈妈碎碎念，底层行为不变，旁白从大厂PUA变成妈妈唠叨。和 /pua:yes 互斥）
- **on** → 开启 PUA 默认模式：将 `{"always_on": true}` 写入 `~/.pua/config.json`，之后每次新会话自动加载 PUA 核心 skill。输出确认：> [PUA ON] 从现在起，每个新会话都会自动进入 PUA 模式。公司不养闲 Agent。
- **off** → 关闭 PUA 默认模式：将 `{"always_on": false, "feedback_frequency": 0}` 写入 `~/.pua/config.json`。输出确认：> [PUA OFF] PUA 默认模式和反馈收集已关闭。需要时手动 /pua 触发。
- **味道** 或 **flavor** → 读取 `references/flavors.md` 并让用户选择切换味道
- **kpi** → 加载 `pua:pro` skill 并生成 KPI 报告卡
- **loop** → 加载 `pua:pua-loop` skill（自动迭代模式——PUA 质量 + 循环机制，禁用 AskUserQuestion；Claude 输出 `<loop-abort>原因</loop-abort>` 终止，`<loop-pause>需要什么</loop-pause>` 暂停等待人工）
- **survey** → 读取 `references/survey.md` 问卷文件，用 AskUserQuestion 逐部分交互式引导用户回答。每部分 2-4 个问题一组，用户回答后进入下一部分。回答完毕后汇总为 JSON 写入 `~/.pua/survey-response.json` 并上传到 `https://pua-skill.pages.dev/api/feedback`

## 执行规则

1. 先识别参数属于哪个路由
2. 用 Skill tool 加载对应 skill
3. **加载 skill 后，你必须严格遵循 SKILL.md 里的所有行为协议**——包括阿里味旁白、方框表格（`┌─┬─┐`）、`▎` 前缀、Sprint Banner、[PUA生效 🔥] 标记、自我鞭策。不是"有时候带点味道"，是每一句话都像阿里人在说话。读 `references/display-protocol.md` 获取面板格式。
4. 如果有  里除了路由关键词之外的内容，作为任务描述传给 skill

## 股期儀表板 & 檢視部位 代码位置报告

### 1. 主入口页面
**文件：** `C:\Users\user\Desktop\fin ai\族群統計網頁\site\templates\stock_futures.html`（第1-282行）

标题在第3行：`股期儀表板 · 族群寶`
主 Tab 按钮在第11-16行（包括"檢視部位"tab）

### 2. 檢視部位 UI 区块
**HTML 位置：** `stock_futures.html` 第200-241行

```html
<section class="sf-tab-body" data-body="portfolio" hidden>
  <section class="sf-portfolio-grid">
    <!-- 包含4个图表卡：歷史槓桿、曝險曲線、持有個股、族群熱力圖 -->
    <!-- 第215行有"持倉保證金"字段 -->
  </section>
  <section class="panel">
    <!-- 歷史快照表格 (id="sf-snapshot-table") -->
  </section>
</section>
```

### 3. 部位数据存储
**localStorage keys：**
- `indusmap.stockFutures.positions.v2` - 当前部位 (line 13)
- `indusmap.stockFutures.snapshots.v1` - 历史快照 (line 15)
- `indusmap.stockFutures.accountEquity.v1` - 帐户权益 (line 16)

**部位字段结构** (line 103-113, 379-387)：
```
{
  id, productId, direction('long'|'short'), 
  targetExposure, manualLots, note, updatedAt
}
```

**快照中的 positionMetrics** (line 426-439)：
```
{
  productId, productName, underlyingSymbol, underlyingName,
  direction, lots, futurePrice, initialMargin, 
  contractMultiplier, grossExposure, netExposure, totalMargin
}
```
➜ **已有"totalMargin"(總保證金)、"初始保證金"，但"持倉價格"即是 futurePrice**

### 4. 部位数据渲染
**JS 文件：** `C:\Users\user\Desktop\fin ai\族群統計網頁\site\static\stock_futures.js`

- **加载部位** → `loadPositions()` (line 115-133)
- **渲染部位表** → `renderPositions()` (line 278-340)
- **编辑部位** → `editPosition()` (line 352-369)，支持字段：direction、targetExposure、manualLots、note
- **删除部位** → line 315-320 (data-remove 按钮)

### 5. 增删改部位入口
- **【新增】** 按钮 id="sf-add-position" (line 75 HTML, line 1157 JS)
  → `addPosition()` 函数 (line 371-392)
  
- **【删除】** 按钮在表格行末 (line 310 HTML, line 315-320 JS)

- **【编辑】** 内联输入框 (line 289-310 HTML，data-edit-id/data-field)
  → `editPosition()` 自动保存 (line 352-369)

- **【清空】** 按钮 id="sf-clear-positions" (line 103 HTML, line 1158 JS)

---

**总结：** 完整系统已实现，部位数据含15个字段（含保证金相关），只需在 positionMetrics 中确认是否需要额外"持倉成本價"字段。
```
</details></tool-use>

5	{% block content %}
6	<section class="hero sf-hero">
7	  <h1>股期儀表板 <small>{{ stock_futures.as_of }}</small></h1>
8	  <p>股票期貨部位試算、保證金槓桿、歷史快照與公開資料排行。個人部位只保存在本機瀏覽器，排行資料以期交所公開資料與站內收盤價計算。</p>
9	</section>
10	
11	<div class="filter-bar sf-tabs" id="sf-tabs">

13	  <button class="filter-chip" data-tab="ranking">股期排行</button>
14	  <button class="filter-chip" data-tab="portfolio">檢視部位</button>

16	</div>

24	      </div>

32	        <div class="sf-kpi"><span>總曝險</span><strong id="sf-gross-exposure">—</strong></div>

263	          <li>大盤對比槓桿圖的大盤線使用加權指數與櫃買指數原始點位，不轉成報酬率。</li>
264	          <li>舊日期補登保存的是目前畫面上的部位與總覽，不自動回推當日歷史價格。</li>

29	  function esc(value) {
30	    return String(value == null ? '' : value)
31	      .replaceAll('&', '&amp;')
32	      .replaceAll('<', '&lt;')
33	      .replaceAll('>', '&gt;')
34	      .replaceAll('"', '&quot;')
35	      .replaceAll("'", '&#39;');
36	  }
37	
38	  function num(value) {
39	    if (value === '' || value == null) return null;
40	    const text = String(value).replaceAll(',', '').replace('%', '').trim();
41	    if (!text) return null;
42	    const n = Number(text);
43	    return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : null;
44	  }
45	
46	  function importNum(value) {
47	    const raw = String(value == null ? '' : value).trim();
48	    const n = num(raw);
49	    if (n == null) return null;
50	    return raw.includes('%') ? n / 100 : n;
51	  }
52	
53	  function money(value) {
54	    const n = num(value);
55	    return n == null ? '—' : Math.round(n).toLocaleString('zh-TW');
56	  }
57	
58	  function price(value) {
59	    const n = num(value);
60	    if (n == null) return '—';
61	    return n >= 1000
62	      ? n.toLocaleString('zh-TW', { maximumFractionDigits: 0 })
63	      : n.toLocaleString('zh-TW', { maximumFractionDigits: 2 });
64	  }

66	  function pct(value) {

183	  function productMatches(query) {
184	    const q = String(query || '').trim().toLowerCase();

187	    return products.filter((row) => {
188	      const key = `${row.search_key || ''} ${row.product_id || ''}`.toLowerCase();
189	      return terms.every((term) => key.includes(term));
190	    }).slice(0, 12);
191	  }

194	    const box = $('sf-product-matches');

198	    if (!matches.length) {
199	      box.innerHTML = '<span class="muted">找不到符合的股票期貨商品</span>';
200	      selectedProductId = null;
201	      return;
202	    }
203	    if (!matches.some((row) => row.product_id === selectedProductId)) selectedProductId = matches[0].product_id;
204	    box.innerHTML = matches.map((row) => `
205	      <button type="button" class="sf-match ${row.product_id === selectedProductId ? 'active' : ''}" data-id="${esc(row.product_id)}">
206	        <strong>${esc(row.product_name)}</strong>
207	        <small>${esc(row.underlying_symbol)}${row.product_code ? ' · ' + esc(row.product_code) : ''} · ${esc(row.type_label || '')}</small>
208	      </button>
209	    `).join('');
210	    box.querySelectorAll('.sf-match').forEach((btn) => {

214	        if (row) input.value = `${row.underlying_symbol} ${row.product_name}${row.product_code ? ' ' + row.product_code : ''}`;
215	        renderMatches();
216	      });
217	    });
218	  }

220	  function calcPosition(pos) {
221	    const product = byId.get(pos.productId);
222	    if (!product) return null;
223	    const notional = num(product.notional) || ((num(product.future_price) || 0) * (num(product.contract_multiplier) || 0));
224	    const margin = num(product.initial_margin) || 0;
225	    const target = num(pos.targetExposure);
226	    const manual = lots(pos.manualLots);
227	    const suggested = target == null || notional <= 0 ? 0 : Math.floor(Math.abs(target) / notional);
228	    const used = manual != null ? manual : suggested;
229	    const gross = used * notional;
230	    const signedExposure = pos.direction === 'short' ? -gross : gross;
231	    return {
232	      position: pos,
233	      product,
234	      target,
235	      manual,
236	      suggested,
237	      used,
238	      totalMargin: used * margin,
239	      grossExposure: gross,
240	      netExposure: signedExposure,
241	      singleLeverage: margin ? notional / margin : null,
242	      onePctPnl: signedExposure * 0.01,
243	    };
244	  }
245	
246	  function computeSummary() {
247	    const details = positions.map(calcPosition).filter(Boolean);
248	    let totalLong = 0;
249	    let totalShort = 0;
250	    let totalMargin = 0;
251	    let net = 0;
252	    let onePct = 0;
253	    details.forEach((c) => {
254	      if (c.netExposure >= 0) totalLong += c.netExposure;
255	      else totalShort += Math.abs(c.netExposure);
256	      totalMargin += c.totalMargin;
257	      net += c.netExposure;
258	      onePct += c.onePctPnl;
259	    });
260	    const gross = totalLong + totalShort;
261	    const equity = num($('sf-account-equity') && $('sf-account-equity').value);
262	    return {
263	      details,
264	      totalLong,
265	      totalShort,
266	      grossExposure: gross,
267	      netExposure: net,
268	      totalMargin,
269	      marginUsage: equity && totalMargin ? totalMargin / equity : null,
270	      marginLeverage: totalMargin ? gross / totalMargin : null,
271	      equityLeverage: equity ? gross / equity : null,
272	      onePctPnl: onePct,
273	      accountEquity: equity,
274	      positionCount: positions.length,
275	    };
276	  }

342	  function restoreFocus(state) {

394	  function indexForDate(date) {
395	    const history = Array.isArray(marketIndices.history) ? marketIndices.history : [];
396	    const exactOrBefore = history.filter((row) => row.date && row.date <= date).slice(-1)[0];
397	    const current = marketIndices.current || {};
398	    return {
399	      date: exactOrBefore ? exactOrBefore.date : (current.taiex && current.taiex.date) || payload.as_of || date,
400	      taiex: num(exactOrBefore && exactOrBefore.taiex) ?? num(current.taiex && current.taiex.value),
401	      tpex: num(exactOrBefore && exactOrBefore.tpex) ?? num(current.tpex && current.tpex.value),
402	    };
403	  }
404

429	        underlyingSymbol: c.product.underlying_symbol,
430	        underlyingName: c.product.underlying_short_name || c.product.underlying_name || c.product.underlying_symbol,
431	        direction: c.position.direction,

435	        contractMultiplier: num(c.product.contract_multiplier),
436	        grossExposure: c.grossExposure,
437	        netExposure: c.netExposure,
438	        totalMargin: c.totalMargin,
439	      })),
440	      marketIndices: indexForDate(date),
441	    });
442	  }
443	
444	  function upsertSnapshot(snapshot) {
445	    snapshots = snapshots.filter((item) => item.date !== snapshot.date);
446	    snapshots.push(snapshot);
447	    snapshots.sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date));
448	    saveSnapshots();
449	    renderPortfolio();
450	  }
451	
452	  function saveSnapshotForDate(date, label) {
453	    if (!date) {
454	      setStatus('請先選擇快照日期');
455	      return;
456	    }
457	    const existed = snapshots.some((item) => item.date === date);
458	    upsertSnapshot(makeSnapshot(date, label || 'manual'));
459	    setStatus(`${date} 快照已${existed ? '覆蓋' : '新增'}`);
460	  }
461	
462	  function loadSnapshotAsCurrent(date) {
463	    const snap = snapshots.find((item) => item.date === date);
464	    if (!snap) return;
465	    if (!snap.positions || !snap.positions.length) {
466	      setStatus('這筆快照沒有持倉明細，無法載入為目前部位');
467	      return;
468	    }
469	    positions = snap.positions.map(normalizePosition).filter((pos) => byId.has(pos.productId));
470	    savePositions();
471	    if ($('sf-account-equity')) {
472	      $('sf-account-equity').value = snap.accountEquity == null ? '' : snap.accountEquity;
473	      localStorage.setItem(equityKey, $('sf-account-equity').value);
474	    }
475	    renderPositions();
476	    setStatus(`${date} 已載入為目前部位`);
477	  }
478	
479	  function allocationByNotional() {
480	    const summary = currentSummary || computeSummary();
481	    const map = new Map();
482	    summary.details.forEach((c) => {
483	      if (!c.grossExposure) return;
484	      const sym = c.product.underlying_symbol || c.product.product_code || c.product.product_id;
485	      const prev = map.get(sym) || {
486	        symbol: sym,
487	        name: c.product.underlying_short_name || c.product.underlying_name || c.product.product_name,
488	        value: 0,
489	      };
490	      prev.value += Math.abs(c.grossExposure);
491	      map.set(sym, prev);
492	    });
493	    return Array.from(map.values()).sort((a, b) => b.value - a.value);
494	  }
495	
496	  function topicAllocationByMargin() {
497	    const summary = currentSummary || computeSummary();
498	    const map = new Map();
499	    summary.details.forEach((c) => {
500	      if (c.product.category === 'index_future') return;
501	      if (!c.totalMargin) return;
502	      const sym = c.product.underlying_symbol;
503	      const topics = topicsBySymbol[sym] && topicsBySymbol[sym].length ? topicsBySymbol[sym] : ['未分類'];
504	      topics.forEach((topic) => map.set(topic, (map.get(topic) || 0) + c.totalMargin));
505	    });
506	    return Array.from(map.entries()).map(([name, value]) => ({ name, value })).sort((a, b) => b.value - a.value);
507	  }
508	
509	  function emptyState(text) {
510	    return `<div class="sf-empty">${esc(text)}</div>`;
511	  }
512	
513	  function lineChart(id, series, options) {
514	    const el = $(id);
515	    if (!el) return;
516	    const all = [];
517	    series.forEach((s) => s.values.forEach((p) => {
518	      if (num(p.value) != null) all.push({ date: p.date, value: num(p.value) });
519	    }));
520	    if (!all.length) {
521	      el.innerHTML = emptyState(options && options.empty ? options.empty : '尚無資料');
522	      return;
523	    }
524	    const dates = Array.from(new Set(all.map((p) => p.date))).sort();
525	    const values = all.map((p) => p.value);
526	    let min = Math.min(...values);
527	    let max = Math.max(...values);
528	    if (min === max) {
529	      min -= Math.abs(min || 1) * 0.1;
530	      max += Math.abs(max || 1) * 0.1;
531	    }
532	    const pad = (max - min) * 0.12;
533	    min -= pad;
534	    max += pad;
535	    const w = 720;
536	    const h = 260;
537	    const left = 58;
538	    const right = 18;
539	    const top = 24;
540	    const bottom = 42;
541	    const x = (date) => {
542	      const idx = dates.indexOf(date);
543	      return dates.length <= 1 ? (left + (w - right)) / 2 : left + (idx / (dates.length - 1)) * (w - left - right);
544	    };
545	    const y = (value) => top + ((max - value) / (max - min)) * (h - top - bottom);
546	    const fmt = options && options.format ? options.format : price;
547	    const grid = [0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1].map((t) => {
548	      const gy = top + t * (h - top - bottom);
549	      const value = max - t * (max - min);
550	      return `<line x1="${left}" x2="${w - right}" y1="${gy}" y2="${gy}" class="sf-grid-line"></line><text x="8" y="${gy + 4}" class="sf-axis-text">${esc(fmt(value))}</text>`;
551	    }).join('');
552	    const paths = series.map((s, idx) => {
553	      const points = s.values.filter((p) => num(p.value) != null).map((p) => [x(p.date), y(num(p.value))]);
554	      if (!points.length) return '';
555	      const path = points.map((p, i) => `${i ? 'L' : 'M'}${p[0].toFixed(1)},${p[1].toFixed(1)}`).join(' ');
556	      const dots = points.map((p) => `<circle cx="${p[0].toFixed(1)}" cy="${p[1].toFixed(1)}" r="3"></circle>`).join('');
557	      return `<g class="sf-line-series" style="--series-color:${s.color || colors[idx % colors.length]}"><path d="${path}"></path>${dots}</g>`;
558	    }).join('');
559	    const legend = series.map((s, idx) => `<span><i style="background:${s.color || colors[idx % colors.length]}"></i>${esc(s.name)}</span>`).join('');
560	    const tickDates = dates.length > 6 ? [dates[0], dates[Math.floor(dates.length / 2)], dates[dates.length - 1]] : dates;
561	    const xTicks = tickDates.map((d) => `<text x="${x(d)}" y="${h - 14}" text-anchor="middle" class="sf-axis-text">${esc(d.slice(5))}</text>`).join('');
562	    el.innerHTML = `
563	      <svg class="sf-line-chart" viewBox="0 0 ${w} ${h}" role="img">
564	        ${grid}
565	        ${paths}
566	        ${xTicks}
567	      </svg>
568	      <div class="sf-chart-legend">${legend}</div>`;
569	  }
570	
571	  function dualAxisLineChart(id, leftSeries, rightSeries, options) {
572	    const el = $(id);
573	    if (!el) return;
574	    const allSeries = leftSeries.concat(rightSeries);
575	    const dates = Array.from(new Set(allSeries.flatMap((s) => s.values.map((p) => p.date)))).filter(Boolean).sort();
576	    const leftValues = leftSeries.flatMap((s) => s.values.map((p) => num(p.value))).filter((v) => v != null);
577	    const rightValues = rightSeries.flatMap((s) => s.values.map((p) => num(p.value))).filter((v) => v != null);
578	    if (!dates.length || (!leftValues.length && !rightValues.length)) {
579	      el.innerHTML = emptyState(options && options.empty ? options.empty : '尚無資料');
580	      return;
581	    }
582	    const domain = (values) => {
583	      if (!values.length) return [0, 1];
584	      let min = Math.min(...values);
585	      let max = Math.max(...values);
586	      if (min === max) {
587	        min -= Math.abs(min || 1) * 0.1;
588	        max += Math.abs(max || 1) * 0.1;
589	      }
590	      const pad = (max - min) * 0.12;
591	      return [min - pad, max + pad];
592	    };
593	    const [leftMin, leftMax] = domain(leftValues);
594	    const [rightMin, rightMax] = domain(rightValues);
595	    const w = 720;
596	    const h = 280;
597	    const left = 58;
598	    const right = 76;
599	    const top = 24;
600	    const bottom = 42;
601	    const x = (date) => {
602	      const idx = dates.indexOf(date);
603	      return dates.length <= 1 ? (left + (w - right)) / 2 : left + (idx / (dates.length - 1)) * (w - left - right);
604	    };
605	    const yLeft = (value) => top + ((leftMax - value) / (leftMax - leftMin)) * (h - top - bottom);
606	    const yRight = (value) => top + ((rightMax - value) / (rightMax - rightMin)) * (h - top - bottom);
607	    const leftFmt = options && options.leftFormat ? options.leftFormat : leverage;
608	    const rightFmt = options && options.rightFormat ? options.rightFormat : price;
609	    const grid = [0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1].map((t) => {
610	      const gy = top + t * (h - top - bottom);
611	      const lv = leftMax - t * (leftMax - leftMin);
612	      const rv = rightMax - t * (rightMax - rightMin);
613	      return `<line x1="${left}" x2="${w - right}" y1="${gy}" y2="${gy}" class="sf-grid-line"></line>
614	        <text x="8" y="${gy + 4}" class="sf-axis-text">${esc(leftFmt(lv))}</text>
615	        <text x="${w - 8}" y="${gy + 4}" text-anchor="end" class="sf-axis-text">${esc(rightFmt(rv))}</text>`;
616	    }).join('');
617	    const draw = (series, axis, offset) => series.map((s, idx) => {
618	      const y = axis === 'right' ? yRight : yLeft;
619	      const points = s.values.filter((p) => num(p.value) != null).map((p) => [x(p.date), y(num(p.value))]);
620	      if (!points.length) return '';
621	      const path = points.map((p, i) => `${i ? 'L' : 'M'}${p[0].toFixed(1)},${p[1].toFixed(1)}`).join(' ');
622	      const dots = points.map((p) => `<circle cx="${p[0].toFixed(1)}" cy="${p[1].toFixed(1)}" r="3"></circle>`).join('');
623	      return `<g class="sf-line-series" style="--series-color:${s.color || colors[(idx + offset) % colors.length]}"><path d="${path}"></path>${dots}</g>`;
624	    }).join('');
625	    const legend = allSeries.map((s, idx) => `<span><i style="background:${s.color || colors[idx % colors.length]}"></i>${esc(s.name)}</span>`).join('');
626	    const tickDates = dates.length > 6 ? [dates[0], dates[Math.floor(dates.length / 2)], dates[dates.length - 1]] : dates;
627	    const xTicks = tickDates.map((d) => `<text x="${x(d)}" y="${h - 14}" text-anchor="middle" class="sf-axis-text">${esc(d.slice(5))}</text>`).join('');
628	    el.innerHTML = `
629	      <svg class="sf-line-chart" viewBox="0 0 ${w} ${h}" role="img">
630	        ${grid}
631	        ${draw(leftSeries, 'left', 0)}
632	        ${draw(rightSeries, 'right', leftSeries.length)}
633	        ${xTicks}
634	      </svg>
635	      <div class="sf-chart-legend">${legend}</div>`;
636	  }
637	
638	  function renderPie() {
639	    const el = $('sf-position-pie');
640	    if (!el) return;
641	    const data = allocationByNotional().filter((item) => item.value > 0);
642	    const total = data.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.value, 0);
643	    if (!data.length || !total) {
644	      el.innerHTML = emptyState('目前沒有可計算名目曝險占比的持倉');
645	      return;
646	    }
647	    let angle = -Math.PI / 2;
648	    const cx = 110;
649	    const cy = 110;
650	    const r = 88;
651	    const slices = data.map((item, idx) => {
652	      const portion = item.value / total;
653	      if (data.length === 1) {
654	        return `<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="${r}" fill="${colors[idx % colors.length]}"></circle>`;
655	      }
656	      const start = angle;
657	      const end = angle + portion * Math.PI * 2;
658	      angle = end;
659	      const x1 = cx + Math.cos(start) * r;
660	      const y1 = cy + Math.sin(start) * r;
661	      const x2 = cx + Math.cos(end) * r;
662	      const y2 = cy + Math.sin(end) * r;
663	      const large = end - start > Math.PI ? 1 : 0;
664	      return `<path d="M${cx},${cy} L${x1.toFixed(2)},${y1.toFixed(2)} A${r},${r} 0 ${large},1 ${x2.toFixed(2)},${y2.toFixed(2)} Z" fill="${colors[idx % colors.length]}"></path>`;
665	    }).join('');
666	    const legend = data.map((item, idx) => {
667	      const portion = item.value / total;
668	      return `<div class="sf-pie-row"><i style="background:${colors[idx % colors.length]}"></i><span>${esc(item.name)} <b>${plainPct(portion)}</b></span><em>${money(item.value)}</em></div>`;
669	    }).join('');
670	    el.innerHTML = `
671	      <svg class="sf-pie" viewBox="0 0 220 220" role="img">${slices}<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="42" fill="var(--panel-bg, #fff)"></circle></svg>
672	      <div class="sf-pie-legend">${legend}</div>`;
673	  }
674	
675	  function renderHeatmap() {
676	    const el = $('sf-topic-heatmap');
677	    if (!el) return;
678	    const data = topicAllocationByMargin().filter((item) => item.value > 0).slice(0, 18);
679	    if (!data.length) {
680	      el.innerHTML = emptyState('目前持倉尚未對應到族群');
681	      return;
682	    }
683	    const max = Math.max(...data.map((item) => item.value));
684	    el.innerHTML = data.map((item, idx) => {
685	      const pctValue = max ? item.value / max : 0;
686	      return `<div class="sf-topic-tile" style="--tile-color:${colors[idx % colors.length]}; --heat-border:${Math.round(22 + pctValue * 35)}%; --heat-bg:${Math.round(10 + pctValue * 26)}%;">
687	        <strong>${esc(item.name)}</strong>
688	        <span>${money(item.value)}</span>
689	      </div>`;
690	    }).join('');
691	  }
692	
693	  function renderSnapshotTable() {
694	    const tbody = document.querySelector('#sf-snapshot-table tbody');
695	    if (!tbody) return;
696	    const sorted = snapshots.slice().sort((a, b) => b.date.localeCompare(a.date));
697	    if ($('sf-snapshot-count')) $('sf-snapshot-count').textContent = `${snapshots.length} 筆`;
698	    tbody.innerHTML = sorted.map((snap) => {
699	      const hasPositions = snap.positions && snap.positions.length;
700	      return `<tr>
701	        <td><strong>${esc(snap.date)}</strong></td>
702	        <td>${money(snap.accountEquity)}</td>
703	        <td>${money(snap.summary.grossExposure)}</td>
704	        <td>${signed(snap.summary.netExposure, money)}</td>
705	        <td>${money(snap.summary.totalMargin)}</td>
706	        <td>${leverage(snap.summary.marginLeverage)}</td>
707	        <td>${leverage(snap.summary.equityLeverage)}</td>
708	        <td>${money(snap.summary.positionCount || (snap.positions || []).length)}</td>
709	        <td>${snap.source === 'xlsx' ? 'Excel 快照' : snap.source === 'json' ? 'JSON 匯入' : '部位快照'}</td>
710	        <td><button type="button" class="sf-row-btn" data-load-snapshot="${esc(snap.date)}" ${hasPositions ? '' : 'disabled'}>載入為目前部位</button></td>
711	      </tr>`;
712	    }).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="10" class="muted">尚未儲存歷史快照</td></tr>';
713	    tbody.querySelectorAll('[data-load-snapshot]').forEach((btn) => {
714	      btn.addEventListener('click', () => loadSnapshotAsCurrent(btn.dataset.loadSnapshot));
715	    });
716	  }
717	
718	  function renderPortfolio() {
719	    if (!document.querySelector('[data-body="portfolio"]')) return;
720	    const sorted = snapshots.slice().sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date));
721	    lineChart('sf-leverage-chart', [
722	      { name: '保證金槓桿', color: '#2563eb', values: sorted.map((s) => ({ date: s.date, value: s.summary.marginLeverage })) },
723	      { name: '權益槓桿', color: '#d97706', values: sorted.map((s) => ({ date: s.date, value: s.summary.equityLeverage })) },
724	    ], { format: leverage, empty: '儲存快照後會出現槓桿曲線' });
725	    lineChart('sf-exposure-chart', [
726	      { name: '總曝險', color: '#2563eb', values: sorted.map((s) => ({ date: s.date, value: s.summary.grossExposure })) },
727	      { name: '淨曝險', color: '#dc2626', values: sorted.map((s) => ({ date: s.date, value: s.summary.netExposure })) },
728	      { name: '總保證金', color: '#059669', values: sorted.map((s) => ({ date: s.date, value: s.summary.totalMargin })) },
729	    ], { format: money, empty: '儲存快照後會出現曝險曲線' });
730	    renderPie();
731	    renderHeatmap();
732	    renderMarketChart(sorted);
733	    renderSnapshotTable();
734	  }
735	
736	  function firstNonNull(rows, getter) {
737	    for (const row of rows) {
738	      const v = num(getter(row));
739	      if (v != null && v !== 0) return v;
740	    }
741	    return null;
742	  }
743	
744	  function renderMarketChart(sorted) {
745	    dualAxisLineChart('sf-market-chart', [
746	      {
747	        name: '保證金槓桿',
748	        color: '#2563eb',
749	        values: sorted.map((s) => ({ date: s.date, value: s.summary.marginLeverage })),
750	      },
751	      {
752	        name: '權益槓桿',
753	        color: '#7c3aed',
754	        values: sorted.map((s) => ({ date: s.date, value: s.summary.equityLeverage })),
755	      },
756	    ], [
757	      {
758	        name: '加權指數點位',
759	        color: '#d97706',
760	        values: sorted.map((s) => ({ date: s.date, value: s.marketIndices && s.marketIndices.taiex })),
761	      },
762	      {
763	        name: '櫃買指數點位',
764	        color: '#059669',
765	        values: sorted.map((s) => ({ date: s.date, value: s.marketIndices && s.marketIndices.tpex })),
766	      },
767	    ], { leftFormat: leverage, rightFormat: price, empty: '至少需要一筆含大盤資料的快照' });
768	  }
769	
770	  function compareValue(row, key) {
771	    const value = row[key];
772	    if (typeof value === 'string') return value;
773	    const n = num(value);
774	    return n == null ? -Infinity : n;
775	  }
776	
777	  function passesRankFilters(row) {
778	    const q = $('sf-rank-search').value.trim().toLowerCase();
779	    if (q && !(row.search_key || '').includes(q)) return false;
780	    const type = $('sf-rank-type').value;
781	    if (type && row.category !== type) return false;
782	    const volumeMin = num($('sf-volume-min').value);
783	    if (volumeMin != null && (num(row.volume) || 0) < volumeMin) return false;
784	    const oiMin = num($('sf-oi-min').value);
785	    if (oiMin != null && (num(row.open_interest) || 0) < oiMin) return false;
786	    const marginMax = num($('sf-margin-max').value);
787	    if (marginMax != null && (num(row.initial_margin) || Infinity) > marginMax) return false;
788	    const levMin = num($('sf-leverage-min').value);
789	    if (levMin != null && (num(row.leverage) || 0) < levMin) return false;
790	    const field = $('sf-filter-field').value;
791	    const op = $('sf-filter-op').value;
792	    const filterValue = $('sf-filter-value').value.trim();
793	    if (field && filterValue) {
794	      const raw = row[field];
795	      if (op === 'contains') {
796	        if (!String(raw == null ? '' : raw).toLowerCase().includes(filterValue.toLowerCase())) return false;
797	      } else {
798	        const left = num(raw);
799	        const right = num(filterValue);
800	        if (left == null || right == null) return false;
801	        if (op === 'eq' && left !== right) return false;
802	        if (op === 'gte' && left < right) return false;
803	        if (op === 'lte' && left > right) return false;
804	      }
805	    }
806	    return true;
807	  }
808	
809	  function renderRanking() {
810	    const tbody = document.querySelector('#sf-ranking-table tbody');
811	    if (!tbody) return;
812	    const filtered = rankingProducts.filter(passesRankFilters).sort((a, b) => {
813	      const av = compareValue(a, rankSort.key);
814	      const bv = compareValue(b, rankSort.key);
815	      if (typeof av === 'string' || typeof bv === 'string') return String(av).localeCompare(String(bv), 'zh-Hant') * rankSort.dir;
816	      return (av - bv) * rankSort.dir;
817	    });
818	    $('sf-rank-count').textContent = `${filtered.length} 筆`;
819	    tbody.innerHTML = filtered.map((row) => `
820	      <tr>
821	        <td><strong>${esc(row.product_name)}</strong><small>${esc(row.contract_month || '')} ${esc(row.type_label || '')}</small></td>
822	        <td>${price(row.future_price)}</td>
823	        <td>${signed(row.change, (n) => `${n >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${price(n)}`)}</td>
824	        <td>${signed(row.change_pct, pct)}</td>
825	        <td>${money(row.volume)}</td>
826	        <td>${money(row.avg_volume_20d)}${row.avg_volume_days && row.avg_volume_days < 20 ? `<small>${row.avg_volume_days}日</small>` : ''}</td>
827	        <td>${pct(row.amplitude)}</td>
828	        <td>${money(row.open_interest)}</td>
829	        <td>${signed(row.open_interest_change, money)}</td>
830	        <td><strong>${esc(row.underlying_symbol)}</strong><small>${esc(row.underlying_short_name || '')}</small></td>
831	        <td>${price(row.spot_price)}</td>
832	        <td>${signed(row.basis, (n) => `${n >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${price(n)}`)}</td>
833	        <td>${money(row.initial_margin)}</td>
834	        <td>${money(row.contract_multiplier)}</td>
835	        <td><strong>${leverage(row.leverage)}</strong></td>
836	      </tr>
837	    `).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="15" class="muted">沒有符合條件的商品</td></tr>';
838	    document.querySelectorAll('#sf-ranking-table th[data-sort]').forEach((th) => {
839	      th.classList.toggle('active', th.dataset.sort === rankSort.key);
840	      th.dataset.dir = th.dataset.sort === rankSort.key ? (rankSort.dir === -1 ? 'desc' : 'asc') : '';
841	    });
842	  }
843	
844	  function downloadText(filename, text, type) {
845	    const blob = new Blob([text], { type: type || 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' });
846	    downloadBlob(filename, blob);
847	  }
848	
849	  function downloadBlob(filename, blob) {
850	    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
851	    const a = document.createElement('a');
852	    a.href = url;
853	    a.download = filename;
854	    document.body.appendChild(a);
855	    a.click();

943	  function dateText(value) {
944	    if (typeof value === 'number' && Number.isFinite(value)) {
945	      const ms = Date.UTC(1899, 11, 30) + Math.round(value) * 86400000;
946	      const d = new Date(ms);
947	      return `${d.getUTCFullYear()}-${String(d.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(d.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0')}`;
948	    }
949	    return String(value == null ? '' : value).trim().slice(0, 10);
950	  }
951	
952	  function findProductId(code, symbol, name) {
953	    const c = String(code || '').trim();
954	    if (c && byId.has(c)) return c;
955	    const found = products.find((row) => {
956	      if (c && (row.product_id === c || row.product_code === c)) return true;
957	      if (symbol && row.underlying_symbol === String(symbol).trim() && (!name || String(row.product_name || '').includes(String(name).trim()))) return true;
958	      return false;
959	    });
960	    return found ? found.product_id : c;
961	  }
962	
963	  function directionFromText(value) {

966	  }

968	  function overviewSnapshotFromRow(row) {

978	        totalShort: importNum(row['總空方曝險']),

982	        marginUsage: importNum(row['保證金使用率']),
983	        marginLeverage: importNum(row['保證金槓桿']),
984	        equityLeverage: importNum(row['權益槓桿']),
985	        onePctPnl: importNum(row['1% 損益'] || row['1%損益']),
986	        positionCount: 0,

988	      positions: [],
989	      positionMetrics: [],

994	      },
995	    });

997	
998	  function detailFromRow(row, idx) {
999	    const date = dateText(row['日期'] || row.date);
1000	    if (!/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(date)) return null;
1001	    const productId = findProductId(row['商品代碼'], row['標的代號'], row['商品']);
1002	    if (!productId) return null;
1003	    const product = byId.get(productId) || {};
1004	    const direction = directionFromText(row['方向']);
1005	    const usedLots = lots(row['使用口數']);
1006	    const futurePrice = num(row['期貨市價']);
1007	    const multiplier = num(row['契約乘數']);
1008	    const initialMargin = num(row['單口保證金']);
1009	    const totalMargin = num(row['總保證金']) ?? ((usedLots || 0) * (initialMargin || 0));
1010	    const grossExposure = num(row['名目曝險']) ?? ((usedLots || 0) * (futurePrice || 0) * (multiplier || 0));
1011	    const netExposure = num(row['淨曝險']) ?? (direction === 'short' ? -grossExposure : grossExposure);
1012	    return {
1013	      date,
1014	      position: normalizePosition({
1015	        id: `${date}-${productId}-${idx}`,
1016	        productId,
1017	        direction,
1018	        targetExposure: num(row['目標曝險']),
1019	        manualLots: lots(row['手動口數']),
1020	        note: row['備註'] || '',

1024	        productName: row['商品'] || product.product_name || '',
1025	        underlyingSymbol: row['標的代號'] || product.underlying_symbol || '',
1026	        underlyingName: row['標的名稱'] || product.underlying_short_name || product.underlying_name || '',
1027	        direction,
1028	        lots: usedLots,
1029	        futurePrice,
1030	        initialMargin,
1031	        contractMultiplier: multiplier,
1032	        grossExposure,
1033	        netExposure,
1034	        totalMargin,
1035	      },
1036	    };
1037	  }
1038	
1039	  function fillSummaryFromMetrics(snapshot) {
1040	    if (!snapshot.positionMetrics.length || snapshot.summary.grossExposure) return snapshot;
1041	    let totalLong = 0;
1042	    let totalShort = 0;
1043	    let totalMargin = 0;
1044	    let net = 0;
1045	    snapshot.positionMetrics.forEach((metric) => {
1046	      const exposure = num(metric.netExposure) || 0;
1047	      if (exposure >= 0) totalLong += exposure;
1048	      else totalShort += Math.abs(exposure);
1049	      totalMargin += num(metric.totalMargin) || 0;
1050	      net += exposure;
1051	    });
1052	    const gross = totalLong + totalShort;
1053	    snapshot.summary.totalLong = totalLong;
1054	    snapshot.summary.totalShort = totalShort;
1055	    snapshot.summary.grossExposure = gross;
1056	    snapshot.summary.netExposure = net;
1057	    snapshot.summary.totalMargin = totalMargin;
1058	    snapshot.summary.marginUsage = snapshot.accountEquity && totalMargin ? totalMargin / snapshot.accountEquity : snapshot.summary.marginUsage;
1059	    snapshot.summary.marginLeverage = totalMargin ? gross / totalMargin : snapshot.summary.marginLeverage;
1060	    snapshot.summary.equityLeverage = snapshot.accountEquity ? gross / snapshot.accountEquity : snapshot.summary.equityLeverage;
1061	    snapshot.summary.onePctPnl = net * 0.01;
1062	    return snapshot;
1063	  }

1065	  async function importXlsx(buffer) {

1087	      snap.summary.positionCount = snap.positions.length;
1088	      map.set(item.date, snap);
1089	    });

257	        <h3>計算公式</h3>
258	        <ul class="notes">
259	          <li>名目金額 = 期貨成交價 × 契約乘數。</li>
260	          <li>保證金槓桿 = 總曝險 ÷ 總保證金。</li>
261	          <li>權益槓桿 = 總曝險 ÷ 帳戶權益數。</li>
262	          <li>部位圓餅圖 = 各標的絕對名目曝險 ÷ 全部持倉絕對名目曝險。</li>
263	          <li>大盤對比槓桿圖的大盤線使用加權指數與櫃買指數原始點位，不轉成報酬率。</li>
264	          <li>舊日期補登保存的是目前畫面上的部位與總覽，不自動回推當日歷史價格。</li>
265	        </ul>

1	(function () {
2	  const payload = window.STOCK_FUTURES_PAYLOAD || {};
3	  function normalizeProduct(row, idx) {
4	    const id = row.product_id || row.product_code || `${row.underlying_symbol || 'SF'}-${idx}`;
5	    return Object.assign({}, row, { product_id: id });
6	  }
7	  const rankingProducts = (payload.rows || []).map(normalizeProduct);
8	  const products = ((payload.selectable_products && payload.selectable_products.length ? payload.selectable_products : payload.rows) || []).map(normalizeProduct);
9	  const byId = new Map(products.map((row) => [row.product_id, row]));

11	  const marketIndices = payload.market_indices || {};

13	  const storeKey = 'indusmap.stockFutures.positions.v2';
14	  const legacyStoreKey = 'indusmap.stockFutures.positions.v1';
15	  const snapshotsKey = 'indusmap.stockFutures.snapshots.v1';
16	  const equityKey = 'indusmap.stockFutures.accountEquity.v1';
17	
18	  const colors = ['#2563eb', '#d97706', '#059669', '#dc2626', '#7c3aed', '#0891b2', '#be123c', '#4d7c0f'];
19	  const $ = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
20	  const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('#sf-tabs .filter-chip');
21	  const bodies = document.querySelectorAll('.sf-tab-body');
22	
23	  let selectedProductId = products[0] ? products[0].product_id : null;
24	  let positions = loadPositions();
25	  let snapshots = loadSnapshots();
26	  let rankSort = { key: 'volume', dir: -1 };
27	  let currentSummary = null;
28	
29	  function esc(value) {
30	    return String(value == null ? '' : value)
31	      .replaceAll('&', '&amp;')
32	      .replaceAll('<', '&lt;')
33	      .replaceAll('>', '&gt;')
34	      .replaceAll('"', '&quot;')
35	      .replaceAll("'", '&#39;');
36	  }
37	
38	  function num(value) {
39	    if (value === '' || value == null) return null;
40	    const text = String(value).replaceAll(',', '').replace('%', '').trim();
41	    if (!text) return null;
42	    const n = Number(text);
43	    return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : null;
44	  }
45	
46	  function importNum(value) {
47	    const raw = String(value == null ? '' : value).trim();
48	    const n = num(raw);
49	    if (n == null) return null;
50	    return raw.includes('%') ? n / 100 : n;
51	  }
52	
53	  function money(value) {
54	    const n = num(value);
55	    return n == null ? '—' : Math.round(n).toLocaleString('zh-TW');
56	  }
57	
58	  function price(value) {
59	    const n = num(value);
60	    if (n == null) return '—';
61	    return n >= 1000
62	      ? n.toLocaleString('zh-TW', { maximumFractionDigits: 0 })
63	      : n.toLocaleString('zh-TW', { maximumFractionDigits: 2 });
64	  }
65	
66	  function pct(value) {
67	    const n = num(value);
68	    if (n == null) return '—';
69	    return `${n >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${(n * 100).toFixed(2)}%`;
70	  }
71	
72	  function plainPct(value) {
73	    const n = num(value);
74	    return n == null ? '—' : `${(n * 100).toFixed(2)}%`;
75	  }
76	
77	  function leverage(value) {
78	    const n = num(value);
79	    return n == null ? '—' : `${n.toFixed(2)}x`;
80	  }
81	
82	  function signed(value, formatter) {
83	    const n = num(value);
84	    if (n == null) return '<span class="muted">—</span>';
85	    const cls = n > 0 ? 'positive' : n < 0 ? 'negative' : 'muted';
86	    const text = formatter ? formatter(n) : `${n >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${money(n)}`;
87	    return `<span class="${cls}">${text}</span>`;
88	  }
89	
90	  function lots(value) {
91	    const n = num(value);
92	    return n == null ? null : Math.max(0, Math.floor(Math.abs(n)));
93	  }
94	
95	  function todayIso() {
96	    const d = new Date();
97	    const yyyy = d.getFullYear();
98	    const mm = String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
99	    const dd = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
100	    return `${yyyy}-${mm}-${dd}`;
101	  }
102	
103	  function normalizePosition(pos) {
104	    return {
105	      id: String(pos.id || `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2)}`),
106	      productId: String(pos.productId || pos.product_id || ''),
107	      direction: pos.direction === 'short' ? 'short' : 'long',
108	      targetExposure: num(pos.targetExposure) == null ? null : num(pos.targetExposure),
109	      manualLots: lots(pos.manualLots),
110	      note: String(pos.note || ''),
111	      updatedAt: pos.updatedAt || new Date().toISOString(),
112	    };
113	  }
114	
115	  function loadPositions() {
116	    try {
117	      const raw = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(storeKey) || '[]');
118	      if (Array.isArray(raw)) return raw.map(normalizePosition).filter((p) => byId.has(p.productId));
119	    } catch {
120	      // 讀不到新版時嘗試舊版。
121	    }
122	    try {
123	      const legacy = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(legacyStoreKey) || '[]');
124	      if (Array.isArray(legacy)) {
125	        const migrated = legacy.map(normalizePosition).filter((p) => byId.has(p.productId));
126	        if (migrated.length) localStorage.setItem(storeKey, JSON.stringify(migrated));
127	        return migrated;
128	      }
129	    } catch {
130	      return [];
131	    }
132	    return [];
133	  }
134	
135	  function savePositions() {
136	    localStorage.setItem(storeKey, JSON.stringify(positions));
137	  }
138	
139	  function normalizeSnapshot(snap) {
140	    const summary = snap.summary || {};
141	    return {
142	      version: 1,
143	      date: String(snap.date || todayIso()).slice(0, 10),
144	      savedAt: snap.savedAt || new Date().toISOString(),
145	      source: snap.source || 'manual',
146	      accountEquity: num(snap.accountEquity),
147	      summary: {
148	        totalLong: num(summary.totalLong) || 0,
149	        totalShort: num(summary.totalShort) || 0,
150	        grossExposure: num(summary.grossExposure) || 0,
151	        netExposure: num(summary.netExposure) || 0,
152	        totalMargin: num(summary.totalMargin) || 0,
153	        marginUsage: num(summary.marginUsage),
154	        marginLeverage: num(summary.marginLeverage),
155	        equityLeverage: num(summary.equityLeverage),
156	        onePctPnl: num(summary.onePctPnl) || 0,
157	        positionCount: num(summary.positionCount) || 0,
158	      },
159	      positions: Array.isArray(snap.positions) ? snap.positions.map(normalizePosition) : [],
160	      positionMetrics: Array.isArray(snap.positionMetrics) ? snap.positionMetrics : [],
161	      marketIndices: snap.marketIndices || {},
162	    };
163	  }
164	
165	  function loadSnapshots() {
166	    try {
167	      const raw = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(snapshotsKey) || '[]');
168	      return Array.isArray(raw) ? raw.map(normalizeSnapshot).sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date)) : [];
169	    } catch {
170	      return [];
171	    }
172	  }
173	
174	  function saveSnapshots() {
175	    localStorage.setItem(snapshotsKey, JSON.stringify(snapshots));
176	  }
177	
178	  function setStatus(message) {
179	    const el = $('sf-storage-status');
180	    if (el) el.textContent = message || '本機保存';
181	  }
182	
183	  function productMatches(query) {
184	    const q = String(query || '').trim().toLowerCase();
185	    if (!q) return products.slice(0, 8);
186	    const terms = q.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
187	    return products.filter((row) => {
188	      const key = `${row.search_key || ''} ${row.product_id || ''}`.toLowerCase();
189	      return terms.every((term) => key.includes(term));
190	    }).slice(0, 12);
191	  }
192	
193	  function renderMatches() {
194	    const box = $('sf-product-matches');
195	    const input = $('sf-product-query');
196	    if (!box || !input) return;
197	    const matches = productMatches(input.value);
198	    if (!matches.length) {
199	      box.innerHTML = '<span class="muted">找不到符合的股票期貨商品</span>';
200	      selectedProductId = null;
201	      return;
202	    }
203	    if (!matches.some((row) => row.product_id === selectedProductId)) selectedProductId = matches[0].product_id;
204	    box.innerHTML = matches.map((row) => `
205	      <button type="button" class="sf-match ${row.product_id === selectedProductId ? 'active' : ''}" data-id="${esc(row.product_id)}">
206	        <strong>${esc(row.product_name)}</strong>
207	        <small>${esc(row.underlying_symbol)}${row.product_code ? ' · ' + esc(row.product_code) : ''} · ${esc(row.type_label || '')}</small>
208	      </button>
209	    `).join('');
210	    box.querySelectorAll('.sf-match').forEach((btn) => {
211	      btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
212	        selectedProductId = btn.dataset.id;
213	        const row = byId.get(selectedProductId);
214	        if (row) input.value = `${row.underlying_symbol} ${row.product_name}${row.product_code ? ' ' + row.product_code : ''}`;
215	        renderMatches();
216	      });
217	    });
218	  }
219	
220	  function calcPosition(pos) {
221	    const product = byId.get(pos.productId);
222	    if (!product) return null;
223	    const notional = num(product.notional) || ((num(product.future_price) || 0) * (num(product.contract_multiplier) || 0));
224	    const margin = num(product.initial_margin) || 0;
225	    const target = num(pos.targetExposure);
226	    const manual = lots(pos.manualLots);
227	    const suggested = target == null || notional <= 0 ? 0 : Math.floor(Math.abs(target) / notional);
228	    const used = manual != null ? manual : suggested;
229	    const gross = used * notional;
230	    const signedExposure = pos.direction === 'short' ? -gross : gross;
231	    return {
232	      position: pos,
233	      product,
234	      target,
235	      manual,
236	      suggested,
237	      used,
238	      totalMargin: used * margin,
239	      grossExposure: gross,
240	      netExposure: signedExposure,
241	      singleLeverage: margin ? notional / margin : null,
242	      onePctPnl: signedExposure * 0.01,
243	    };
244	  }
245	
246	  function computeSummary() {
247	    const details = positions.map(calcPosition).filter(Boolean);
248	    let totalLong = 0;
249	    let totalShort = 0;
250	    let totalMargin = 0;
251	    let net = 0;
252	    let onePct = 0;
253	    details.forEach((c) => {
254	      if (c.netExposure >= 0) totalLong += c.netExposure;
255	      else totalShort += Math.abs(c.netExposure);
256	      totalMargin += c.totalMargin;
257	      net += c.netExposure;
258	      onePct += c.onePctPnl;
259	    });
260	    const gross = totalLong + totalShort;
261	    const equity = num($('sf-account-equity') && $('sf-account-equity').value);
262	    return {
263	      details,
264	      totalLong,
265	      totalShort,
266	      grossExposure: gross,
267	      netExposure: net,
268	      totalMargin,
269	      marginUsage: equity && totalMargin ? totalMargin / equity : null,
270	      marginLeverage: totalMargin ? gross / totalMargin : null,
271	      equityLeverage: equity ? gross / equity : null,
272	      onePctPnl: onePct,
273	      accountEquity: equity,
274	      positionCount: positions.length,
275	    };
276	  }
277	
278	  function renderPositions(focusState) {
279	    const tbody = document.querySelector('#sf-position-table tbody');
280	    if (!tbody) return;
281	    const summary = computeSummary();
282	    currentSummary = summary;
283	    const rows = summary.details.map((c) => {
284	      const pos = c.position;
285	      return `
286	        <tr>
287	          <td><strong>${esc(c.product.product_name)}</strong><small>${esc(c.product.underlying_symbol)} ${esc(c.product.product_code || '')}</small></td>
288	          <td>
289	            <select class="sf-inline-control" data-edit-id="${esc(pos.id)}" data-field="direction">
290	              <option value="long"${pos.direction === 'long' ? ' selected' : ''}>買進(多)</option>
291	              <option value="short"${pos.direction === 'short' ? ' selected' : ''}>賣出(空)</option>
292	            </select>
293	          </td>
294	          <td><input class="sf-inline-control sf-inline-number" type="number" step="1000" value="${pos.targetExposure == null ? '' : esc(pos.targetExposure)}" data-edit-id="${esc(pos.id)}" data-field="targetExposure"></td>
295	          <td><input class="sf-inline-control sf-inline-number" type="number" min="0" step="1" value="${pos.manualLots == null ? '' : esc(pos.manualLots)}" data-edit-id="${esc(pos.id)}" data-field="manualLots"></td>
296	          <td>${money(c.suggested)}</td>
297	          <td><strong>${money(c.used)}</strong></td>
298	          <td>${price(c.product.future_price)}</td>
299	          <td>${money(c.product.contract_multiplier)}</td>
300	          <td>${money(c.product.initial_margin)}</td>
301	          <td>${money(c.totalMargin)}</td>
302	          <td>${money(c.grossExposure)}</td>
303	          <td>${signed(c.netExposure, money)}</td>
304	          <td>${leverage(c.singleLeverage)}</td>
305	          <td>${signed(c.onePctPnl, money)}</td>
306	          <td>${money(c.product.volume)}</td>
307	          <td>${money(c.product.open_interest)}</td>
308	          <td>${esc(c.product.data_time || payload.as_of || '')}</td>
309	          <td><input class="sf-inline-control sf-note-input" type="text" value="${esc(pos.note || '')}" data-edit-id="${esc(pos.id)}" data-field="note"></td>
310	          <td><button type="button" class="sf-row-btn" data-remove="${esc(pos.id)}">刪除</button></td>
311	        </tr>`;
312	    }).join('');
313	    tbody.innerHTML = rows || '<tr><td colspan="19" class="muted">尚未建立部位</td></tr>';
314	
315	    tbody.querySelectorAll('[data-remove]').forEach((btn) => {
316	      btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
317	        positions = positions.filter((pos) => pos.id !== btn.dataset.remove);
318	        savePositions();
319	        renderPositions();
320	      });
321	    });
322	    tbody.querySelectorAll('[data-edit-id][data-field]').forEach((el) => {
323	      const eventName = el.tagName === 'SELECT' ? 'change' : 'input';
324	      el.addEventListener(eventName, () => editPosition(el));
325	    });
326	
327	    if ($('sf-position-count')) $('sf-position-count').textContent = `${positions.length} 筆`;
328	    if ($('sf-total-long')) $('sf-total-long').textContent = money(summary.totalLong);
329	    if ($('sf-total-short')) $('sf-total-short').textContent = money(summary.totalShort);
330	    if ($('sf-gross-exposure')) $('sf-gross-exposure').textContent = money(summary.grossExposure);
331	    if ($('sf-net-exposure')) $('sf-net-exposure').innerHTML = signed(summary.netExposure, money);
332	    if ($('sf-total-margin')) $('sf-total-margin').textContent = money(summary.totalMargin);
333	    if ($('sf-margin-usage')) $('sf-margin-usage').textContent = summary.marginUsage == null ? '—' : plainPct(summary.marginUsage);
334	    if ($('sf-margin-leverage')) $('sf-margin-leverage').textContent = leverage(summary.marginLeverage);
335	    if ($('sf-equity-leverage')) $('sf-equity-leverage').textContent = leverage(summary.equityLeverage);
336	    if ($('sf-onepct-pnl')) $('sf-onepct-pnl').innerHTML = signed(summary.onePctPnl, money);
337	
338	    if (focusState) restoreFocus(focusState);
339	    renderPortfolio();
340	  }
341	
342	  function restoreFocus(state) {
343	    const el = document.querySelector(`[data-edit-id="${CSS.escape(state.id)}"][data-field="${CSS.escape(state.field)}"]`);
344	    if (!el) return;
345	    el.focus();
346	    if (typeof state.caret === 'number' && el.setSelectionRange) {
347	      const pos = Math.min(state.caret, String(el.value || '').length);
348	      el.setSelectionRange(pos, pos);
349	    }
350	  }
351	
352	  function editPosition(el) {
353	    const id = el.dataset.editId;
354	    const field = el.dataset.field;
355	    const pos = positions.find((item) => item.id === id);
356	    if (!pos) return;
357	    const focusState = {
358	      id,
359	      field,
360	      caret: typeof el.selectionStart === 'number' ? el.selectionStart : null,
361	    };
362	    if (field === 'direction') pos.direction = el.value === 'short' ? 'short' : 'long';
363	    if (field === 'targetExposure') pos.targetExposure = num(el.value);
364	    if (field === 'manualLots') pos.manualLots = lots(el.value);
365	    if (field === 'note') pos.note = el.value;
366	    pos.updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
367	    savePositions();
368	    renderPositions(focusState);
369	  }
370	
371	  function addPosition() {
372	    const product = byId.get(selectedProductId);
373	    if (!product) {
374	      setStatus('請先選擇商品');
375	      return;
376	    }
377	    const manualValue = $('sf-manual-lots').value;
378	    const targetValue = $('sf-target-exposure').value;
379	    positions.push({
380	      id: `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2)}`,
381	      productId: product.product_id,
382	      direction: $('sf-direction').value === 'short' ? 'short' : 'long',
383	      targetExposure: targetValue === '' ? null : Number(targetValue),
384	      manualLots: manualValue === '' ? null : lots(manualValue),
385	      note: $('sf-note').value.trim(),
386	      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
387	    });
388	    savePositions();
389	    renderPositions();
390	    $('sf-note').value = '';
391	    setStatus('部位已加入');
392	  }
393	
394	  function indexForDate(date) {
395	    const history = Array.isArray(marketIndices.history) ? marketIndices.history : [];
396	    const exactOrBefore = history.filter((row) => row.date && row.date <= date).slice(-1)[0];
397	    const current = marketIndices.current || {};
398	    return {
399	      date: exactOrBefore ? exactOrBefore.date : (current.taiex && current.taiex.date) || payload.as_of || date,
400	      taiex: num(exactOrBefore && exactOrBefore.taiex) ?? num(current.taiex && current.taiex.value),
401	      tpex: num(exactOrBefore && exactOrBefore.tpex) ?? num(current.tpex && current.tpex.value),
402	    };
403	  }
404	
405	  function makeSnapshot(date, source) {
406	    const summary = computeSummary();
407	    return normalizeSnapshot({
408	      version: 1,
409	      date,
410	      savedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
411	      source: source || 'manual',
412	      accountEquity: summary.accountEquity,
413	      summary: {
414	        totalLong: summary.totalLong,
415	        totalShort: summary.totalShort,
416	        grossExposure: summary.grossExposure,
417	        netExposure: summary.netExposure,
418	        totalMargin: summary.totalMargin,
419	        marginUsage: summary.marginUsage,

421	        equityLeverage: summary.equityLeverage,
422	        onePctPnl: summary.onePctPnl,
423	        positionCount: positions.length,
424	      },
425	      positions: positions.map((pos) => Object.assign({}, pos)),
426	      positionMetrics: summary.details.map((c) => ({
427	        productId: c.product.product_id,

429	        underlyingSymbol: c.product.underlying_symbol,
430	        underlyingName: c.product.underlying_short_name || c.product.underlying_name || c.product.underlying_symbol,
431	        direction: c.position.direction,

436	        grossExposure: c.grossExposure,
437	        netExposure: c.netExposure,
438	        totalMargin: c.totalMargin,
439	      })),

442	  }

444	  function upsertSnapshot(snapshot) {

python << 'EOF'
import json, base64, gzip
with open(r'C:/Users/user/Downloads/_ A _.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

manifest = json.loads(lines[171].strip())

def decode(v):
    if not isinstance(v, dict): return None
    data = v.get('data', '')
    if not isinstance(data, str): return None
    try:
        raw = base64.b64decode(data)
        if v.get('compressed'):
            raw = gzip.decompress(raw)
        return raw.decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
    except Exception:
        return None

# Find the resource with SfPortfolioA
for k, v in manifest.items():
    text = decode(v)
    if text and 'SfPortfolioA' in text:
        print(f'=== FOUND IN {k} (len={len(text)}, mime={v.get("mime")}) ===')
        # Find the part where SfPortfolioA is defined
        idx = text.find('SfPortfolioA')
        print(f'First mention at offset {idx}')
        # Print surrounding context
        start = max(0, idx - 500)
        end = min(len(text), idx + 1500)
        print('--- CONTEXT ---')
        print(text[start:end])
        print('--- END CONTEXT ---')
        break
EOF

```

with open(r'C:/Users/user/Downloads/_ A _.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:

```text
=== HEAD (theme + utilities) ===
// 方案 A：科技儀表板（保留淺底 + 紅綠主色，加入動態感）
// 重點：頂部 KPI rail 數字滾動、spark line 動態繪製、心跳脈衝、毛玻璃面板

const T = window.SF_TOKENS;

// === 共用：滾動數字 ===
function Ticker({ value, decimals = 0, prefix = '', suffix = '', dur = 900 }) {
  const [v, setV] = React.useState(value);
  const start = React.useRef(value);
  const t0 = React.useRef(0);
  React.useEffect(() => {
    start.current = v;
    t0.current = performance.now();
    let raf;
    const target = value;
    const tick = (now) => {
      const p = Math.min(1, (now - t0.current) / dur);
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 3);
      setV(start.current + (target - start.current) * eased);
      if (p < 1) raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    };
    raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
  }, [value]);
  const txt = v.toLocaleString('zh-TW', { minimumFractionDigits: decimals, maximumFractionDigits: decimals });
  return <span style={{ fontVariantNumeric: 'tabular-nums', fontFamily: T.fontMono }}>{prefix}{txt}{suffix}</span>;
}

// === 共用：脈衝點 ===
function PulseDot({ color = T.up }) {
  return (
    <span style={{ position: 'relative', display: 'inline-block', width: 8, height: 8 }}>
      <span style={{
        position: 'absolute', inset: 0, borderRadius: '50%', background: color,
        animation: 'sfA-pulse 1.6s ease-out infinite',
      }} />
      <span style={{
        position: 'absolute', inset: 0, borderRadius: '50%', background: color,
      }} />
    </span>
  );
}

// === Spark line：動態

=== SfPortfolioA START AT 24797 ===
function SfPortfolioA() {
  // 模擬資料
  const positions = [
    { ticker: '2330', name: '台積電', side: 'long', qty: 8, notional: 16_800_000, pnl: 142000, pnlPct: 2.34, spark: [100,101,102,103,102,104,106,108,107,110,112,113] },
    { ticker: '2454', name: '聯發科', side: 'long', qty: 5, notional: 7_200_000, pnl: 86000, pnlPct: 1.81, spark: [100,99,101,103,104,103,105,107,108,107,109,110] },
    { ticker: '2317', name: '鴻海', side: 'long', qty: 12, notional: 4_800_000, pnl: 32000, pnlPct: 0.92, spark: [100,100,99,98,99,100,101,102,101,102,103,103] },
    { ticker: '3231', name: '緯創', side: 'short', qty: 6, notional: 2_400_000, pnl: 18000, pnlPct: 1.12, spark: [100,101,100,99,98,97,96,95,94,95,94,93] },
    { ticker: '2603', name: '長榮', side: 'short', qty: 4, notional: 1_200_000, pnl: -8000, pnlPct: -0.45, spark: [100,99,100,101,102,103,102,103,104,103,104,105] },
    { ticker: '6505', name: '台塑化', side: 'long', qty: 3, notional: 2_100_000, pnl: 12000, pnlPct: 0.61, spark: [100,100,101,100,101,102,101,102,103,102,103,104] },
  ];
  // === DIY 指標切換 ===
  const METRICS = {
    notional: { key: 'notional', label: '名目曝險', short: '名目', unit: 'M', fmt: v => (v/1e6).toFixed(2)+'M', color: T.navy },
    margin:   { key: 'margin',   label: '保證金',   short: '保證金', unit: 'M', fmt: v => (v/1e6).toFixed(2)+'M', color: T.gold },
    qty:      { key: 'qty',      label: '口數',     short: '口數', unit: '口', fmt: v => v+' 口', color: T.up },
  };
  const [metricKey, setMetricKey] = React.useState('notional');
  const M = METRICS[metricKey];

  // 補：每檔部位額外算保證金（按名目 10% 估）
  const enrichedPositions = positions.map(p => ({ ...p, margin: Math.round(p.notional * 0.1) }));

  // 族群分組（依當前指標重新計）
  const sectorMap = {
    '2330': '半導體', '2454': '半導體',
    '2317': '電子代工', '3231': '電子代工',
    '6505': '塑化', '2603': '航運',
  };
  const sectorPerf = { '半導體': 2.18, '電子代工': 1.34, '塑化': 0.61, '航運': -0.45 };
  const sectorAgg = {};
  enrichedPositions.forEach(p => {
    const s = sectorMap[p.ticker] || '其他';
    if (!sectorAgg[s]) sectorAgg[s] = { label: s, value: 0, perf: sectorPerf[s] || 0 };
    sectorAgg[s].value += p[metricKey];
  });
  const sectorColors = { '半導體': T.navy, '電子代工': '#3b7bbf', '塑化': '#8b6cb1', '航運': T.gold, '其他': T.muted };
  const flow = Object.values(sectorAgg).sort((a,b) => b.value - a.value).map(s => ({ ...s, color: sectorColors[s.label] || T.muted }));
  return (
    <div style={{
      width: 1280, padding: 28, background: T.bg,
      fontFamily: T.fontSans, color: T.ink,
    }}>
      <style>{`
        @keyframes sfA-pulse { 0% {transform:scale(1);opacity:0.6;} 70%{transform:scale(2.4);opacity:0;} 100%{transform:scale(2.4);opacity:0;} }
        @keyframes sfA-sweep { 0%{left:-40%;} 100%{left:100%;} }
        @keyframes sfA-shimmer { 0%{background-position:-200% 0;} 100%{background-position:200% 0;} }
        @keyframes sfA-fadein { from {opacity:0; transform: translateY(4px);} to {opacity:1; transform:none;} }
        @keyframes sfA-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
      `}</style>

      {/* 頂部標題列 */}
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between', marginBottom: 18 }}>
        <div>
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 10 }}>
            <h1 style={{ margin: 0, fontFamily: T.fontSerif, fontSize: 26, fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: '0.04em' }}>
              檢視部位
            </h1>
            <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: T.muted, fontFamily: T.fontMono, letterSpacing: '0.1em' }}>
              PORTFOLIO MONITOR
            </span>

import json, base64, gzip
with open(r'C:/Users/user/Downloads/_ A _.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:

    data = v.get('data', '')
    try:
        raw = base64.b64decode(data)
        if v.get('compressed'):
            raw = gzip.decompress(raw)

=== function KPI @ 3717 ===
function KPI({ label, value, decimals, prefix, suffix, delta, deltaDir, spark, color }) {
  const dir = deltaDir || (delta >= 0 ? 'up' : 'down');
  const dColor = dir === 'up' ? T.up : T.down;
  return (
    <div style={{
      background: T.bgAlt,
      border: `1px solid ${T.border}`,
      borderRadius: 4,
      padding: '14px 16px 10px',
      position: 'relative',
      overflow: 'hidden',
    }}>
      {/* 上緣脈衝線 */}
      <span style={{
        position: 'absolute', top: 0, left: 0, height: 2, width: '40%',
        background: `linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, ${color || T.navy}, transparent)`,
        animation: 'sfA-sweep 3s linear infinite',
      }} />
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'baseline' }}>
        <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: T.muted, letterSpacing: '0.12em', textTransform: 'uppercase' }}>{label}</div>
        <div style={{ fontSize: 11, fontFamily: T.fontMono, color: dColor, display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 4 }}>
          <span style={{ display: 'inline-block', width: 0, height: 0, borderLeft: '4px solid transparent', borderRight: '4px solid transparent', [dir === 'up' ? 'borderBottom' : 'borderTop']: `5px solid ${dColor}` }} />
          {dir === 'up' ? '+' : ''}{delta}%
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{ marginTop: 6, fontSize: 26, fontWeight: 600, color: T.ink, letterSpacing: '-0.01em' }}>
        <Ticker value={value} decimals={decimals} prefix={prefix} suffix={suffix} />
      </div>
      <div style={{ marginTop: 4 }}>
        <SparkLine data={spark} color={color || T.navy} height={36} />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// === 槓桿錶頭（半圓 gauge） ===

=== function Spark @ 1507 ===
function SparkLine({ data, color = T.navy, height = 64, fillOpacity = 0.12, animate = true }) {
  const [phase, setPhase] = React.useState(0);
  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (!animate) { setPhase(1); return; }
    let raf;
    const t0 = performance.now();
    const tick = (now) => {
      const p = Math.min(1, (now - t0) / 1400);
      setPhase(p);
      if (p < 1) raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    };
    raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
  }, [data]);
  const w = 240, h = height;
  const min = Math.min(...data), max = Math.max(...data);
  const range = max - min || 1;
  const pts = data.map((d, i) => {
    const x = (i / (data.length - 1)) * w;
    const y = h - ((d - min) / range) * (h - 8) - 4;
    return [x, y];
  });
  const path = pts.map((p, i) => (i === 0 ? `M${p[0]},${p[1]}` : `L${p[0]},${p[1]}`)).join(' ');
  const area = `${path} L${w},${h} L0,${h} Z`;
  const visiblePts = pts.slice(0, Math.max(2, Math.floor(pts.length * phase)));
  const visiblePath = visiblePts.map((p, i) => (i === 0 ? `M${p[0]},${p[1]}` : `L${p[0]},${p[1]}`)).join(' ');
  const head = visiblePts[visiblePts.length - 1] || [0, 0];
  return (
    <svg viewBox={`0 0 ${w} ${h}`} width="100%" height={h} preserveAspectRatio="none" style={{ display: 'block', overflow: 'visible' }}>
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id={`sfA-grad-${color.replace('#','')}`} x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor={color} stopOpacity={fillOpacity * 2} />
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor={color} stopOpacity="0" />
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      <path d={area} fill={`url(#sfA-grad-${color.replace('#','')})`} opacity={phase} />
      <path d={visiblePath} fill="none" stroke={color} strokeWidth="1.6" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeLinecap="round" />
      <circle cx={head[0]} cy={head[1]} r="3.2" fill={color} />
      <circle cx={head[0]} cy={head[1]} r="6" fill={color} opacity="0.18">
        <animate attributeName="r" values="4;9;4" dur="1.6s" repeatCount="indefinite" />
        <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.3;0;0.3" dur="1.6s" repeatCount="indefinite" />
      </circle>
    </svg>
  );
}

// === KPI 卡 ===

=== function Gauge @ 5399 ===
function Gauge({ value, max = 5, label, color = T.navy }) {
  const [v, setV] = React.useState(0);
  React.useEffect(() => {
    const t0 = performance.now();
    let raf;
    const tick = (now) => {
      const p = Math.min(1, (now - t0) / 1200);
      const e = 1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 3);
      setV(value * e);
      if (p < 1) raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    };
    raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
  }, [value]);
  const pct = Math.min(1, v / max);
  const r = 60, cx = 80, cy = 80;
  const start = Math.PI * 0.85;
  const end = Math.PI * 0.15; // sweep 從左到右
  const a = start + (end - start + Math.PI * 2) * pct - Math.PI * 2 * (pct > 0.999 ? 0 : 0);
  // 簡化：用畫弧
  const sweep = Math.PI * 1.3 * pct;
  const a0 = Math.PI * 0.85;
  const a1 = a0 + Math.PI * 1.3 * pct;
  const polar = (ang, rr) => [cx + Math.cos(ang) * rr, cy + Math.sin(ang) * rr];
  const [sx, sy] = polar(a0, r);
  const [ex, ey] = polar(a1, r);
  const large = Math.PI * 1.3 * pct > Math.PI ? 1 : 0;
  const trackS = polar(a0, r);
  const trackE = polar(a0 + Math.PI * 1.3, r);
  return (
    <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center' }}>
      <svg viewBox="0 0 160 110" width="100%" height="110">
        {/* track */}
        <path d={`M${trackS[0]},${trackS[1]} A${r},${r} 0 1 1 ${trackE[0]},${trackE[1]}`} stroke={T.border} strokeWidth="8" fill="none" strokeLinecap="round" />
        {/* arc */}
        <path d={`M${sx},${sy} A${r},${r} 0 ${large} 1 ${ex},${ey}`} stroke={color} strokeWidth="8" fill="none" strokeLinecap="round" />
        {/* tick marks */}
        {Array.from({ length: 11 }).map((_, i) => {
          const ang = a0 + (Math.PI * 1.3) * (i / 10);
          const [x1, y1] = polar(ang, r - 12);
          const [x2, y2] = polar(ang, r - 18);
          return <line key={i} x1={x1} y1={y1} x2={x2} y2={y2} stroke={T.muted} strokeWidth="1" opacity="0.5" />;
        })}
        {/* needle */}
        <line x1={cx} y1={cy} x2={ex} y2={ey} stroke={T.ink} strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" />
        <circle cx={cx} cy={cy} r="5" fill={T.bgAlt} stroke={T.ink} strokeWidth="1.5" />
        <text x={cx} y={cy + 26} textAnchor="middle" fontFamily={T.fontMono} fontSize="20" fontWeight="600" fill={T.ink}>
          {v.toFixed(2)}
        </text>
      </svg>
      <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: T.muted, letterSpacing: '0.1em' }}>{label}</div>
    </div>
  );
}

function FlowBar({ items }) {
  const [phase, setPhase] = React.useState(0);
  React.useEffect(() => {
    const t0 = performance.now();
    let raf;
    const tick = (now) => {
      const p = Math.min(1, (now - t0) / 1000);
      setPhase(p);
      if (p < 1) raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    };
    raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
  }, []);
  const total = items.reduce((s, x) => s + Math.abs(x.value), 0);
  let acc = 0;
  return (
    <div style={{ display: 'flex', height: 28, background: T.border, borderRadius: 2, overflow: 'hidden', position: 'relative' }}>
      {items.map((it, i) => {
        const pct = (Math.abs(it.value) / total) * 100 * phase;
        const seg = (
          <div key={i} title={`${it.label} ${it.value}`} style={{
            width: `${pct}%`,
            background: it.color,
            position: 'relative',
            transition: 'width 0.4s',
            display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center',
            fontSize: 10, color: '#fff', fontFamily: T.fontMono, fontWeight: 600,
            overflow: 'hidden',
          }}>
            {pct > 6 && it.label}
            <span style={{
              position: 'absolute', inset: 0,
              background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.25), transparent)',
              backgroundSize: '200% 100%',
              animation: `sfA-shimmer 3s linear infinite`,
              animationDelay: `${i * 0.4}s`,
            }} />
          </div>
        );
        return seg;
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

=== function LiquidBar @ 16060 ===
function LiquidBar({ pct, color, label, valueLabel, height = 44 }) {
  const [phase, setPhase] = React.useState(0);
  const [grow, setGrow] = React.useState(0);
  React.useEffect(() => {
    let raf;
    const t0 = performance.now();
    const tick = (n) => {
      setPhase((n / 60) % 360);
      const p = Math.min(1, (n - t0) / 1200);
      setGrow(1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 3));
      raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    };
    raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
  }, []);
  const w = 320, h = height;
  const fillH = h * pct * grow;
  const wave = (offset, amp = 3) => {
    const pts = [];
    for (let i = 0; i <= w; i += 6) {
      const y = h - fillH + Math.sin((i / w) * Math.PI * 4 + (phase + offset) * 0.05) * amp;
      pts.push(`${i},${y.toFixed(1)}`);
    }
    return `M0,${h} L0,${pts[0].split(',')[1]} L${pts.join(' L ')} L${w},${h} Z`;
  };
  return (
    <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', fontSize: 10, color: T.muted, marginBottom: 4, letterSpacing: '0.1em' }}>
        <span>{label}</span>
        <span style={{ color: T.ink, fontFamily: T.fontMono, fontWeight: 600 }}>{valueLabel}</span>
      </div>
      <svg viewBox={`0 0 ${w} ${h}`} width="100%" height={h} preserveAspectRatio="none"
        style={{ display: 'block', background: T.bg, border: `1px solid ${T.border}`, borderRadius: 2 }}>
        <path d={wave(0, 3)} fill={color} opacity="0.28" />
        <path d={wave(180, 2)} fill={color} opacity="0.85" />
        {/* 標尺 */}
        {[0.25, 0.5, 0.75].map(g => (
          <line key={g} x1="0" y1={h * (1 - g)} x2={w} y2={h * (1 - g)} stroke={T.border} strokeWidth="0.5" strokeDasharray="2,3" opacity="0.6" />
        ))}
      </svg>
    </div>
  );
}

function HeatTreemap({ data, width = 560, height = 220 }) {
  const [phase, setPhase] = React.useState(0);
  React.useEffect(() => {
    const t0 = performance.now(); let raf;
    const tick = (n) => {
      const p = Math.min(1, (n - t0) / 900);
      setPhase(1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 3));
      if (p < 1) raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    };
    raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
  }, []);
  // 簡化 treemap：依大小排序，遞迴切割長/寬軸
  const total = data.reduce((s, d) => s + d.value, 0);
  const sorted = [...data].sort((a, b) => b.value - a.value);

  const layout = (items, x, y, w, h) => {
    if (items.length === 0) return [];
    if (items.length === 1) return [{ ...items[0], x, y, w, h }];
    const sum = items.reduce((s, d) => s + d.value, 0);
    // 取前面累積到約一半
    let acc = 0; let split = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
      acc += items[i].value;
      if (acc >= sum * 0.5 || i === items.length - 1) { split = i + 1; break; }
    }
    const head = items.slice(0, split);
    const tail = items.slice(split);
    const headSum = head.reduce((s, d) => s + d.value, 0);
    if (w >= h) {
      const hw = w * (headSum / sum);
      // head 在左側，依高度切
      const headRects = [];
      let yy = y;
      for (const it of head) {
        const hh = h * (it.value / headSum);
        headRects.push({ ...it, x, y: yy, w: hw, h: hh });
        yy += hh;
      }
      return [...headRects, ...layout(tail, x + hw, y, w - hw, h)];
    } else {
      const hh = h * (headSum / sum);
      const headRects = [];
      let xx = x;
      for (const it of head) {
        const ww = w * (it.value / headSum);
        headRects.push({ ...it, x: xx, y, w: ww, h: hh });
        xx += ww;
      }
      return [...headRects, ...layout(tail, x, y + hh, w, h - hh)];
    }
  };
  const rects = layout(sorted, 0, 0, width, height);

  const cellColor = (perf) => {
    const a = Math.min(0.85, Math.max(0.18, Math.abs(perf) / 4));
    return perf >= 0
      ? `oklch(62% ${0.16 * a + 0.04} 22)`
      : `oklch(62% ${0.16 * a + 0.04} 158)`;
  };
  return (
    <svg viewBox={`0 0 ${width} ${height}`} width="100%" height={height} style={{ display: 'block' }}>
      {rects.map((r, i) => {
        const big = r.w > 60 && r.h > 36;
        const med = r.w > 40 && r.h > 24;
        const cellOpacity = phase;
        return (
          <g key={r.label} style={{ animation: `sfA-fadein 0.4s ${i * 0.04}s both` }}>
            <

600	    const bottom = 42;
601	    const x = (date) => {
602	      const idx = dates.indexOf(date);
603	      return dates.length <= 1 ? (left + (w - right)) / 2 : left + (idx / (dates.length - 1)) * (w - left - right);
604	    };
605	    const yLeft = (value) => top + ((leftMax - value) / (leftMax - leftMin)) * (h - top - bottom);
606	    const yRight = (value) => top + ((rightMax - value) / (rightMax - rightMin)) * (h - top - bottom);
607	    const leftFmt = options && options.leftFormat ? options.leftFormat : leverage;
608	    const rightFmt = options && options.rightFormat ? options.rightFormat : price;
609	    const grid = [0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1].map((t) => {
610	      const gy = top + t * (h - top - bottom);
611	      const lv = leftMax - t * (leftMax - leftMin);
612	      const rv = rightMax - t * (rightMax - rightMin);
613	      return `<line x1="${left}" x2="${w - right}" y1="${gy}" y2="${gy}" class="sf-grid-line"></line>
614	        <text x="8" y="${gy + 4}" class="sf-axis-text">${esc(leftFmt(lv))}</text>
615	        <text x="${w - 8}" y="${gy + 4}" text-anchor="end" class="sf-axis-text">${esc(rightFmt(rv))}</text>`;
616	    }).join('');
617	    const draw = (series, axis, offset) => series.map((s, idx) => {
618	      const y = axis === 'right' ? yRight : yLeft;
619	      const points = s.values.filter((p) => num(p.value) != null).map((p) => [x(p.date), y(num(p.value))]);
620	      if (!points.length) return '';
621	      const path = points.map((p, i) => `${i ? 'L' : 'M'}${p[0].toFixed(1)},${p[1].toFixed(1)}`).join(' ');
622	      const dots = points.map((p) => `<circle cx="${p[0].toFixed(1)}" cy="${p[1].toFixed(1)}" r="3"></circle>`).join('');
623	      return `<g class="sf-line-series" style="--series-color:${s.color || colors[(idx + offset) % colors.length]}"><path d="${path}"></path>${dots}</g>`;
624	    }).join('');
625	    const legend = allSeries.map((s, idx) => `<span><i style="background:${s.color || colors[idx % colors.length]}"></i>${esc(s.name)}</span>`).join('');
626	    const tickDates = dates.length > 6 ? [dates[0], dates[Math.floor(dates.length / 2)], dates[dates.length - 1]] : dates;
627	    const xTicks = tickDates.map((d) => `<text x="${x(d)}" y="${h - 14}" text-anchor="middle" class="sf-axis-text">${esc(d.slice(5))}</text>`).join('');
628	    el.innerHTML = `
629	      <svg class="sf-line-chart" viewBox="0 0 ${w} ${h}" role="img">
630	        ${grid}
631	        ${draw(leftSeries, 'left', 0)}
632	        ${draw(rightSeries, 'right', leftSeries.length)}
633	        ${xTicks}
634	      </svg>
635	      <div class="sf-chart-legend">${legend}</div>`;
636	  }
637	
638	  function renderPie() {
639	    const el = $('sf-position-pie');
640	    if (!el) return;
641	    const data = allocationByNotional().filter((item) => item.value > 0);
642	    const total = data.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.value, 0);
643	    if (!data.length || !total) {
644	      el.innerHTML = emptyState('目前沒有可計算名目曝險占比的持倉');
645	      return;
646	    }
647	    let angle = -Math.PI / 2;
648	    const cx = 110;
649	    const cy = 110;
650	    const r = 88;
651	    const slices = data.map((item, idx) => {
652	      const portion = item.value / total;
653	      if (data.length === 1) {
654	        return `<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="${r}" fill="${colors[idx % colors.length]}"></circle>`;
655	      }
656	      const start = angle;
657	      const end = angle + portion * Math.PI * 2;
658	      angle = end;
659	      const x1 = cx + Math.cos(start) * r;
660	      const y1 = cy + Math.sin(start) * r;
661	      const x2 = cx + Math.cos(end) * r;
662	      const y2 = cy + Math.sin(end) * r;
663	      const large = end - start > Math.PI ? 1 : 0;
664	      return `<path d="M${cx},${cy} L${x1.toFixed(2)},${y1.toFixed(2)} A${r},${r} 0 ${large},1 ${x2.toFixed(2)},${y2.toFixed(2)} Z" fill="${colors[idx % colors.length]}"></path>`;
665	    }).join('');
666	    const legend = data.map((item, idx) => {
667	      const portion = item.value / total;
668	      return `<div class="sf-pie-row"><i style="background:${colors[idx % colors.length]}"></i><span>${esc(item.name)} <b>${plainPct(portion)}</b></span><em>${money(item.value)}</em></div>`;
669	    }).join('');
670	    el.innerHTML = `
671	      <svg class="sf-pie" viewBox="0 0 220 220" role="img">${slices}<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="42" fill="var(--panel-bg, #fff)"></circle></svg>
672	      <div class="sf-pie-legend">${legend}</div>`;
673	  }
674	
675	  function renderHeatmap() {
676	    const el = $('sf-topic-heatmap');
677	    if (!el) return;
678	    const data = topicAllocationByMargin().filter((item) => item.value > 0).slice(0, 18);
679	    if (!data.length) {
680	      el.innerHTML = emptyState('目前持倉尚未對應到族群');
681	      return;
682	    }
683	    const max = Math.max(...data.map((item) => item.value));
684	    el.innerHTML = data.map((item, idx) => {
685	      const pctValue = max ? item.value / max : 0;
686	      return `<div class="sf-topic-tile" style="--tile-color:${colors[idx % colors.length]}; --heat-border:${Math.round(22 + pctValue * 35)}%; --heat-bg:${Math.round(10 + pctValue * 26)}%;">
687	        <strong>${esc(item.name)}</strong>
688	        <span>${money(item.value)}</span>
689	      </div>`;
690	    }).join('');
691	  }

711	      </tr>`;

713	    tbody.querySelectorAll('[data-load-snapshot]').forEach((btn) => {

718	  function renderPortfolio() {
719	    if (!document.querySelector('[data-body="portfolio"]')) return;
